title: Wiegmannia arabica
taxonomy: Wiegmannia arabica is classified in the family Rosaceae, which comprises a diverse range of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. The genus Wiegmannia itself is a relatively small group of plants, and Wiegmannia arabica is one of its species. The classification of Wiegmannia arabica provides insight into its evolutionary history and its relationships with other plants in the Rosaceae family.
